_comment: Profile alias map. Two kinds of entries:

_kinds.exact: Hard rename -- silently resolves to target (e.g. 'git' -> 'git-compact').
_kinds.fallback: Soft mapping -- target is the closest local profile for a profile that doesn't exist locally yet (e.g. 'dev' -> 'base'). Emits a [ WARN ] before running.

dev.reason: 'dev' profile not present locally; closest match is 'base' (full Windows dev setup).

dev-advance.reason: 'dev-advance' profile not present locally; closest match is 'advance' (extended dev tooling).

devadvance.reason: 'devadvance' profile not present locally; closest match is 'advance'.

developer.reason: 'developer' profile not present locally; closest match is 'base'.

full.reason: 'full' profile not present locally; closest match is 'advance'.
